title: Checkbox
description: A checkbox lets users select one or more options from a set.
whenToUse: Multiple selections from a set. Binary on/off toggles (terms agreement, opt-in).
whenNotToUse: For mutually exclusive choices, use a radio group instead.
_legacyAccessibilityNotes: Uses native <input type="checkbox"> for screen reader support. The visible indicator is purely decorative — the native input handles interaction.
